description.ko: AQUA-5는 심해의 극한 압력을 견디도록 설계된 최첨단 탐사 드론입니다. 고급 생체 발광 내비게이션 시스템과 소나 매핑 기능을 갖추고 있어 심해의 미스터리를 밝혀냅니다.
description.en: AQUA-5 is a state-of-the-art exploration drone designed to withstand the extreme pressures of the deep ocean. It features advanced bioluminescent navigation systems and sonar mapping capabilities to uncover the mysteries of the abyss.

prompt: Cinematic 8k render of a sleek, bioluminescent deep-sea submersible robot named AQUA-5, exploring a dark oceanic trench, glowing neon blue lights, surrounded by alien-like marine life, bubbles, high-tech sensors, hydrothermal vents in the background, volumetric lighting, photorealistic textures.
